case_title: JUN YAN WANG VS. XIAO JIAN ZENA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, JUN YAN AS TO DEFENDANT ZENA, XIAO JIAN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, JUN YAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZENA, XIAO JIAN AN INDIVIDUAL $5,025.69 PRINCIPAL, $19.67 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,270.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
